text_first_visit: Water seeps from cracks in the ceiling, pooling across the floor. Mining tools lie scattered as if dropped mid-swing. A corroded lockbox sits on a stone ledge above the waterline.
text_revisit: The water is ankle-deep and still rising, slowly.

interactables.name: Corroded Lockbox
interactables.text_on_interact: The lock crumbles at your touch. Inside: a heavy iron key stamped with the mine's seal.

interactables.name: Scattered Mining Tools
interactables.text_on_interact: Pickaxes, shovels, lanterns — all abandoned mid-use. Whatever happened here happened fast.
